questions.answer: Zeekr Power is a charging infrastructure entity jointly owned by Geely Auto and Lotus Technology, with Geely holding a 70% stake and Lotus Technology holding 30%. It provides a comprehensive network of charging solutions across China, including at-home, on-the-road, and mobile charging services. The network features ultracharging stations with up to 600kW power, supercharging stations with up to 240kW, and light charging stations with up to 20kW, ensuring efficient and convenient charging for electric vehicle users. Zeekr Power also integrates with the Zeekr APP for seamless payment and navigation to nearby charging stations. This information is based on knowledge available before 2024-12-31.

rag_info.chunk_content: Charging is key to battery electric vehicles’ performance, user experience, and the battery electric vehicle manufacturers’ business development. As such, Lotus Technology has made efforts to advance its charging capabilities to help deliver a superior experience to drivers of its battery electric vehicles. Through Zeekr Power, an entity in which Geely Auto and Lotus Technology own 70% and 30% equity interest, respectively, Lotus Technology has built an extensive network of charging solutions that offers efficient and convenient power access to customers. The network of Zeekr-branded charging solutions spans across China, including (i) at-home charging solutions, (ii) on-the-road charging solutions, and (iii) mobile charging services. Customers may make payments for charging services using various convenient methods on the Zeekr APP.

[Table Level]  
- **Table Title**: Overview of ZEEKR Charging Solution Network  
- **Table Summary**: The table provides details of the charging infrastructure and service network established by ZEEKR Power as of December 31, 2023. It categorizes charging solutions into "At Home," "On the Road," and "Charging Service," while also highlighting coverage across cities, third-party cooperation, and technical specifications.  
- **Context**: ZEEKR Power focuses on providing efficient and user-friendly charging solutions for battery electric vehicles (BEVs), offering customers access to at-home, on-the-road, and mobile services integrated with the ZEEKR APP for payment and convenience across China. Third-party cooperations further extend the network’s reach.  
- **Special Notes**: Includes ultracharging centers/stations, supercharging stations, and light charging stations. Fast payment and convenient methods are emphasized, and coverage spans over 130 cities by ZEEKR-branded stations and over 340 cities with third-party networks.  

[Row Level]  
**Top Section: Coverage Overview**  
- **Row 1**: The ZEEKR-branded charging stations are available in over 130 cities, providing enhanced accessibility and convenience for customers through exclusive infrastructure.  
- **Row 2**: A third-party charging network covers over 340 cities, significantly expanding the reach and compatibility of charging solutions beyond ZEEKR Power’s proprietary setup.  
- **Row 3**: Approximately 610,000 charging piles are part of the third-party network, ensuring a vast infrastructure for BEV users to recharge efficiently in diverse locations.  
- **Row 4**: ZEEKR Power collaborates with various third-party cooperators, including recognizable entities such as China Southern Power Grid Corporation and TELD, to further enhance the charging network capabilities.  

**Middle Section: Charging Solutions**  
- **Row 5 (At Home)**: Home-use charging piles are available in 7kW, 11kW, and 20kW variants, allowing users to plug and charge vehicles regularly and conveniently share access with family members.  
- **Row 6 (At Home)**: These home piles support regular recharging and are seamlessly integrated with plug-and-charge functionality for ease of use.  

- **Row 7 (Ultra Charging Center/Station)**: On-the-road ultracharging centers/stations deliver up to 600kW charging power, enabling users to charge from 10% to 80% in just 15 minutes. These stations support fast payment for improved user experience.  
- **Row 8 (Supercharging/Light Charging Stations)**: Supercharging stations provide up to 240kW charging power, while light charging stations offer up to 20kW charging capacity. Both types feature plug-and-charge compatibility and fast payment options for seamless service delivery.  

**Bottom Section: Charging Service**  
- **Row 9 (Charging Van/Service Team)**: Charging vans offer mobile services such as “Charging Butler Service” and 1-on-1 interactions, operating 24/7 to meet customer needs anytime and anywhere.  

**Other Features**  
- **Row 10 (Charging Map)**: The charging map provides coverage of all ZEEKR charging piles and connections with third-party public charging piles. It also supports smart route planning to optimize travel for BEV users.

The on-the-road charging solutions comprise charging stations operated by ZEEKR Power. The ZEEKR APP also helps drivers locate and navigate to nearby third-party charging stations. As of December 31, 2023, there were 882 charging stations operated by ZEEKR Power, including 436 ultra charging stations, 330 super charging stations, and 116 light charging stations, covering over 130 cities in China. As of the same date, there were over 54 thousand third-party charging stations with approximately 610 thousand charging piles available on the ZEEKR APP, covering over 340 cities in China. In particular, the on-the-road charging solutions comprise charging stations operated by ZEEKR Power. • Ultra charging station. The ultra charging stations provide up-to-600 kW chargers to customers. ZEEKR Power is one of the earliest to use proprietary liquid-cooling technology in China, according to Frost & Sullivan, which allows the charging process to be shortened by approximately 60% to 75% as compared to conventional 150kW–240kW chargers. The liquid-cooling technology uses 24 mm diameter charging cables, making it significantly lighter than conventional cables and allowing drivers to plug in the cable with one hand. • Super charging station and light charging station. Customers who need a prompt quick recharge can use the super charging stations that are installed with up-to-240 kW chargers and the light charging stations that are equipped with up-to-20 kW light chargers, respectively.

ZEEKR Intelligent Technology Holding Limited (the “Company” or “ZEEKR”) was incorporated under the law of the Cayman Islands on March 31, 2021. ZEEKR, together with its subsidiaries (collectively, the “Group”), is principally engaged in the commercialization and sales of electric vehicles and batteries, as well as the provision of automotive-related research and development services. Prior to the establishment of ZEEKR Intelligent Technology Holding Limited, the Group’s business was conducted through the following entities:

[Table Level]
- **Table Title:** Entities Under ZEEKR Group and Their Principal Activities
- **Table Summary:** The table lists entities within the ZEEKR Group along with their geographic locations of incorporation and primary business functions. The entities focus on various aspects of electric vehicle production, commercialization, and supporting activities, such as research and development and investment holding.
- **Context:** Prior to ZEEKR Intelligent Technology Holding Limited's establishment in 2021, the listed entities conducted business operations related to electric vehicles and batteries under the common control of Zhejiang Geely Holding Group Co., Ltd. The restructuring was necessary to form an independent battery electric vehicle business for investment opportunities and overseas listing.
- **Special Notes:** All values are qualitative descriptions, and the restructuring aligns with the Group’s strategic focus on electric vehicle commercialization.

[Row Level]
- **Row 1:** ZEEKR Automobile (Shanghai) Co., Ltd., previously known as Shanghai Maple Guorun Automobile Company Ltd. (“ZEEKR Shanghai”), is incorporated in the People’s Republic of China and primarily operates as an investment holding company.
- **Row 2:** ZEEKR Automobile (Ningbo Hangzhou Bay New Zone) Co., Ltd. (“ZEEKR Hangzhou Bay”) is incorporated in the People’s Republic of China and is responsible for managing the production and commercialization of electric vehicles.
- **Row 3:** Viridi E-Mobility Technology (Ningbo) Co., Ltd. (“Ningbo Viridi”) is incorporated in the People’s Republic of China and focuses on the production and sales of electric powertrains and battery packs for electric vehicles.
- **Row 4:** Zeekr Technology Europe AB, previously known as China-Euro Vehicle Technology Aktiebolag (“CEVT”), is incorporated in Sweden and provides research and development services.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: Zeekr’s smart cockpit is powered by Zeekr OS, an exclusive distributed operating system designed for battery electric vehicles (BEVs), seamlessly integrated with Zeekr's state-of-the-art electrical and electronic (E/E) architecture. By dynamically allocating processing power to services, functions, and applications in real-time, Zeekr OS optimizes cockpit interactions, autonomous driving, and vehicle control, ensuring a seamless and highly responsive user experience. Zeekr OS features a unified service-oriented architecture, in-house full-stack research and development (R&D), optimized network diagnostics, and automated software integration testing, eliminating system lag and enabling continuous updates. With multi-kernel compatibility (Linux, QNX), Zeekr OS supports 360-degree surround-view monitoring, parking assistance, and intelligent energy management, setting a new benchmark for BEV software architecture. The smart cockpit experience is further enhanced by the Qualcomm 8295 SoC-based platform, standard across all Zeekr vehicle models launched in 2024, with the Zeekr 009 Grand featuring the world’s first dual-8295 configuration. The Zeekr Sound audio system, equipped with AI-powered tuning, delivers premium acoustic performance, while the Human-Machine Interface (HMI) 3.5 introduces 3D navigation, advanced visual effects, and an intuitive Eva family interface. EVA, the AI-powered driving assistant, leverages machine learning, natural language processing (NLP), and computer vision to provide intelligent voice interaction, predictive assistance, and customizable AI personas. Additionally, Zeekr’s open cockpit ecosystem integrates a virtualized mobile platform, a Scenario Library, and Internet of Things (IoT) connectivity, allowing seamless integration with smart home devices, gaming, and entertainment applications such as Kid Zone, Tencent Cloud Gaming, and wireless karaoke.

title: Smart Cockpit 
summary: Zeekr's smart cockpit, set to launch in 2024, is powered by Zeekr OS, a specialized distributed operating system designed for battery electric vehicles (BEVs). This system integrates advanced electronic and electrical architecture, enabling real-time processing power allocation to enhance user interactions, autonomous driving, and vehicle control. Key features include a unified service-oriented architecture, in-house R&D, improved network diagnostics, and automated software integration testing, which together minimize system lag and support continuous updates. The multi-kernel compatibility allows for advanced functionalities like 360-degree surround-view monitoring and intelligent energy management, setting a new benchmark for BEV software.

The smart cockpit experience is further elevated by the Qualcomm 8295 SoC platform, particularly in the Zeekr 009 Grand, which boasts a dual-8295 configuration. The Zeekr Sound audio system delivers premium sound through AI-driven tuning, while the HMI 3.5 offers advanced 3D navigation and visual effects, enhanced by the intuitive Eva family interface. EVA, the AI assistant, leverages machine learning and natural language processing for intelligent voice interactions and customizable AI personas. The open cockpit ecosystem promotes a virtualized mobile platform and IoT connectivity, allowing integration with smart home devices and entertainment options like Kid Zone, Tencent Cloud Gaming, and wireless karaoke. Overall, Zeekr's smart cockpit, driven by Zeekr OS and AI advancements, aims to provide an immersive and connected driving experience.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: Zeekr 001, Zeekr's first mass-produced battery electric vehicle (BEV), is a premium crossover shooting brake developed with proprietary research and development (R&D), deep market insights, and the Sustainable Experience Architecture (SEA) platform. Launched in April 2021 with deliveries beginning in October 2021, the Zeekr 001 was the first mass-produced BEV with over $1,000 kilometers CLTC range. In October 2023, Zeekr introduced the Zeekr 001 FR, a high-performance variant featuring a lightweight carbon fiber body, 800V Qilin battery, and quad e-drive system, achieving 2.02 seconds 0-100 kilometers per hour acceleration and a 280 kilometers per hour top speed. In 2024, Zeekr launched upgraded versions of the Zeekr 001 with Zeekr Intelligent Driving 2.0 and significant performance, safety, and intelligence upgrades.

metadata.title_summary:
title: Zeekr 001 
summary: The Zeekr 001, launched in April 2021 as the first mass-produced battery electric vehicle (BEV) on the SEA platform, is a premium crossover shooting brake known for its remarkable range of over 1,000 km on the CLTC cycle. In October 2023, the high-performance Zeekr 001 FR variant was unveiled, featuring a lightweight carbon fiber body, an 800V Qilin battery, and a quad e-drive system that enables acceleration from 0 to 100 km/h in just 2.02 seconds, with a top speed of 280 km/h. In 2024, the Zeekr 001 received upgrades, including the Zeekr Intelligent Driving 2.0 system, enhancing its performance, safety, and intelligence.

metadata.title_summary:
title: CHARGING SOLUTIONS 
summary: The ZEEKR Charging Solution Network, developed through the joint venture ZEEKR Power, plays a vital role in enhancing the performance and user experience of Battery Electric Vehicles (BEVs) in China. As of December 31, 2023, this comprehensive network encompasses various charging solutions, including at-home, on-the-road, and mobile charging services, ensuring efficient access to power for customers.

The network boasts ZEEKR-branded charging stations in over 130 cities, supplemented by a third-party network that spans more than 340 cities and features around 610,000 charging piles. Collaborations with key partners, such as China Southern Power Grid Corporation and TELD, further strengthen its infrastructure.

Charging solutions are categorized into three main types: at-home options with varying power capacities (7kW, 11kW, and 20kW) for regular use, on-the-road ultracharging centers capable of delivering up to 600kW for rapid charging, and supercharging stations with up to 240kW power. Additionally, ZEEKR provides mobile charging services via dedicated vans for 24/7 assistance.

To enhance user convenience, a charging map is available for locating ZEEKR and third-party charging piles, facilitating smart route planning. The network emphasizes fast payment options and seamless service integration, reflecting its commitment to improving the overall charging experience for BEV users in China.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: Zeekr vehicles are equipped with safe, efficient, and durable battery solutions tailored for different models. Zeekr’s 800V ultra-fast charging battery technology offers three advanced solutions for optimal performance and efficiency: (1) The Qilin Battery enables 10% to 80% State of Charge (SoC) charging in just 15 minutes, providing high energy density and extended range, (2) The Shenxing Battery supports 10% to 80% SoC charging in 11.5 minutes, delivering ultrafast charging with excellent durability, and (3) The self-developed Golden Battery achieves 10% to 80% SoC charging in only 10.5 minutes, setting a new benchmark for high-performance fast-charging technology. With these three solutions, Zeekr continues to push the boundaries of battery efficiency, speed, and endurance in the Battery Electric Vehicle (BEV) industry. For instance, the Zeekr 001 FR features an 800V Qilin battery for superior range and charging speed, while the Zeekr 7X features the self-developed Golden Battery. The battery packs developed by Ningbo Viridi can also be enhanced by Ningbo Viridi's proprietary battery management system, or BMS, to manage and optimize the battery performance, durability, and safety. For details of the battery solutions and technologies of Ningbo Viridi, see “Item 4. Information on the Company—4.B. Business Overview—Ningbo Viridi.”

metadata.title_summary:
title: Battery Solutions 
summary: Zeekr vehicles incorporate cutting-edge battery technologies that emphasize safety, efficiency, and longevity across their range. Utilizing 800V ultra-fast charging, Zeekr offers three advanced battery options: the Qilin Battery, which charges from 10% to 80% in 15 minutes; the Shenxing Battery, achieving the same charge in 11.5 minutes with exceptional durability; and the Golden Battery, capable of charging in just 10.5 minutes. These innovations significantly enhance battery performance in the Battery Electric Vehicle (BEV) market, with the Zeekr 001 FR featuring the Qilin battery for optimal range and speed, while the Zeekr 7X is equipped with the Golden Battery. Additionally, Ningbo Viridi has developed battery packs that can be optimized through its proprietary battery management system (BMS), further improving performance and safety. For more details on these technologies, refer to the company's business overview.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: Customers try out Zeekr products and technologies, as well as participate in a wide range of events in the Zeekr Space, which usually occupies 100 square meters to 300 square meters in commercial areas. Lotus Technology has also launched Pop-Up Zeekr Spaces in China, which have more flexible leasing terms than the usual Zeekr Space and help the company connect with an expanded customer base. Zeekr Delivery Center. Lotus Technology utilizes Zeekr Delivery Centers for product delivery, most of which are located at facilities with large areas outside urban commercial centers to allow for vehicle storage and simultaneous delivery. Zeekr House. Lotus Technology launches additional Zeekr Houses in areas where car dealer shops are located across different tiers of cities in China, which allow the company to utilize the cluster effect and provide customers with a superior one-stop experience. Leveraging the service network of its sister brands in Geely Group, Lotus Technology plans to develop its Zeekr Houses cost-effectively and rapidly with the Zeekr brand and design. Through the Zeekr APP, prospective customers can place orders by paying a nonrefundable order deposit or production deposit. Relying on Lotus Technology's strong supply chain management capabilities inherited from Geely Group, Lotus Technology enables customers to choose from a vast pool of configurations, such as vehicle color, wheel hub size and style, air suspension system option, automatic door option, sound system, intelligent air conditioning package, and seat ventilation.

metadata.title_summary:
title: Direct Sales and Service Model 
summary: The company adopts a customer-centric go-to-market strategy, spearheaded by a skilled in-house sales and marketing team of 7,134 members, with a significant majority having extensive experience in the automobile and retail sectors. This team oversees a direct-to-consumer (DTC) sales network, which includes 538 offline locations—467 in China and 71 internationally—designed to provide a comprehensive, high-quality customer experience throughout the sales lifecycle. Key components of this network include the Zeekr Center, which serves as a premium showroom and community hub, and Zeekr Space, where customers can engage with products and attend events. Additionally, Zeekr Delivery Centers facilitate efficient product delivery, while Zeekr House locations are strategically positioned near car dealerships to enhance customer service through a one-stop experience. 

The Zeekr APP further streamlines the purchasing process, allowing customers to place orders with a nonrefundable deposit and customize their vehicle configurations. Following a 72-hour confirmation period, delivery specialists assist with pre-delivery arrangements and coordinate the final delivery, ensuring a seamless transition from order to ownership. This integrated approach not only enhances customer engagement but also leverages the Geely Group's supply chain to deliver value-added services efficiently.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: Zeekr Technology Europe AB, or Zeekr Tech EU/ZTE, is Zeekr Technology's Sweden-based R&D center founded in 2013 that is strategically focused on the following aspects. Zeekr Technology Europe AB conducts R&D activities relating to the products that Zeekr Technology plans to roll out in overseas markets. These products include, among others, (i) next-generation mobility solutions, such as robotaxi, (ii) passenger battery electric vehicles (BEVs) satisfying local standards and customer preferences, and (iii) a series of digital offerings, such as data analytics tools and smart cockpit functions. ● Zeekr Technology Europe AB also implements the development of a variety of BEV-related technologies and capabilities, such as user-centric systems with in-vehicle, cloud, and mobile functionalities, in-vehicle centralized architecture, as well as a cloud-based data management platform for user experiences and data analytics. Zeekr Technology Europe AB also provides specific R&D services on a project basis. ● In addition, Zeekr Technology Europe AB has developed SEA-M, an advanced version of SEA featuring integration potential for autonomous driving systems and future smart mobility, to support Zeekr Technology’s next-generation BEVs. SEA-M is designed to enable mobility solutions that fulfill different use cases with superior driving experience, ultralong durability, and the capabilities for ongoing upgrades. BEVs developed on this platform, such as the Zeekr Mix and Waymo RT robotaxi, can have a number of innovative features, such as wide door openings with no B-pillar, highly flexible interiors, and advanced interior climate technologies. SEA-M will further facilitate the design for future BEV models.

title: Zeekr Tech EU 
summary: Zeekr Technology Europe AB (Zeekr Tech EU), established in 2013 in Sweden, serves as a research and development hub focused on creating innovative products for international markets. The organization specializes in next-generation mobility solutions, including robotaxis and battery electric vehicles (BEVs) tailored to local standards, alongside digital offerings like data analytics and smart cockpit functions. A significant focus is placed on advancing BEV technologies that prioritize user-centric systems, integrating in-vehicle, cloud, and mobile functionalities with centralized architecture for improved user experiences.

Central to Zeekr Tech EU's initiatives is the SEA-M platform, an evolution of the SEA architecture designed to support autonomous driving and smart mobility. This platform aims to deliver versatile mobility options, exceptional driving experiences, and long-lasting vehicles that can be continuously upgraded. BEVs developed on this platform, such as the Zeekr Mix and Waymo RT robotaxi, feature innovative designs, including wide door openings and flexible interiors. By the end of 2024, the company employed 733 individuals, focusing on mobility technologies, digital solutions, and future product development.

title: An Innovative Automotive Technology Company with Strong Product Offering to Capture Massive Premium BEV Market Opportunity 
summary: ZEEKR is an emerging battery electric vehicle (BEV) technology company dedicated to creating premium electric vehicles and innovative solutions that promote the electrification and intelligentization of the automotive sector. Operating as an independent startup, ZEEKR utilizes its in-house research and development capabilities alongside a proprietary sales and marketing network, all managed by a diverse and efficient leadership team. Notably, while some executives have ties to Geely Auto, they will not hold executive roles post-offering, ensuring a distinct operational identity.

Since its launch less than three years ago, ZEEKR has introduced several models, including the ZEEKR 001, a five-seater crossover, the luxury ZEEKR 009 MPV, and the compact ZEEKR X SUV, among others. The brand has garnered significant market attention, achieving rapid sales milestones, such as 10,000 deliveries of the ZEEKR 001 shortly after its release, positioning it as one of China’s fastest-selling premium BEVs.

ZEEKR vehicles are built on Geely Holding's proprietary SEA platform, which facilitates swift development and launch of new models while ensuring exceptional performance and user experience. The ZEEKR 001 and ZEEKR 009 are recognized for their impressive range capabilities, with the ZEEKR 009 being the first pure-electric MPV to exceed 800 km in range. Additionally, ZEEKR incorporates advanced autonomous driving technologies powered by cutting-edge hardware, enhancing both performance and safety.

The company emphasizes customer satisfaction through a focus on innovative technology and premium features, such as customizable in-vehicle configurations and luxurious amenities in models like the ZEEKR 009 Grand, which includes heated massaging seats and high-quality entertainment systems. Overall, ZEEKR is committed to delivering a holistic smart mobility experience, setting a high standard in the premium BEV market.

title: OVERVIEW 
summary: ZEEKR is an emerging leader in the battery electric vehicle (BEV) sector, dedicated to driving innovation and electrification within the automotive industry. The company focuses on developing next-generation premium BEVs and technology-driven solutions, leveraging strong in-house research and development capabilities and a flexible organizational structure to rapidly create and launch customer-oriented products. 

Since its inception, ZEEKR has introduced several groundbreaking models, including the ZEEKR 001, recognized as the world's first mass-produced pure electric shooting brake with a range exceeding 1,000 km, and the luxury ZEEKR 009 MPV, which offers an ultra-luxury experience. The lineup also features the compact ZEEKR X SUV and a newly launched upscale sedan model, all designed to cater to diverse consumer needs while emphasizing stylish design, high performance, and exceptional user experiences.

ZEEKR's growth trajectory has been impressive, with significant milestones such as delivering over 10,000 units of the ZEEKR 001 within four months of its launch and achieving a total of 196,633 vehicle deliveries by the end of 2023. The company benefits from its affiliation with Geely Group, which provides extensive industry expertise, innovative engineering, and a robust supply chain, enhancing ZEEKR's product reliability and market competitiveness.

The company is also committed to advancing its technological capabilities, focusing on electrification and intelligent mobility. This includes the development of its proprietary E/E architecture and ZEEKR OS, which facilitate over-the-air updates and the integration of cutting-edge autonomous driving technologies. 

As the global BEV market is poised for substantial growth, particularly in China and Europe, ZEEKR aims to capitalize on this potential by expanding its vehicle portfolio and enhancing its customer engagement through a direct-to-consumer sales model. The company has established a comprehensive charging network and formed strategic partnerships to bolster its business development and global reach, positioning itself for continued success in the rapidly evolving electric vehicle landscape.

Lotus Technology's efforts are backed by strong in-house R&D capabilities, a deep understanding of products, high operational flexibility, and a flat, efficient organizational structure. With a focus on next-generation premium BEVs, ZEEKR leverages strong in-house research and development capabilities, a flexible organizational structure, and a deep understanding of customer needs to efficiently develop and launch products. The company has established a prominent position in the premium BEV market with models such as the ZEEKR 001, ZEEKR 009, ZEEKR X, and an upscale sedan, all emphasizing stylish design, high performance, and exceptional user experiences.

Since its inception in October 2021, ZEEKR has achieved remarkable milestones, including the rapid delivery of 196,633 vehicles by December 2023, with 192,441 units sold in China alone. The ZEEKR 001, recognized as the world's first mass-produced pure electric shooting brake, has been particularly successful, reaching 10,000 units delivered within four months of its launch. The company benefits from the extensive resources and industry experience of its parent company, Geely Group, which enhances ZEEKR's product innovation and operational efficiency.

ZEEKR's technological advancements are supported by its proprietary SEA platform, enabling a diverse range of vehicle types and facilitating the integration of cutting-edge technologies. The company is also focused on enhancing the customer experience through a direct-to-consumer sales model and a comprehensive network of customer touchpoints across China. Additionally, ZEEKR is expanding its charging infrastructure and forming strategic partnerships with leading firms to support its growth and global expansion.

The BEV market is experiencing significant growth, particularly in China, where sales are projected to increase dramatically in the coming years. ZEEKR aims to capitalize on this trend by expanding its vehicle portfolio and exploring new markets, including the robotaxi sector in the United States. With a strong management team and a commitment to customer-centric operations, ZEEKR is well-positioned to lead the future of premium electric mobility.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: Lotus Technology's co-founder and CEO Conghui An has over 25 years’ experience in multiple executive management positions in Geely Group and accumulated profound industry insights and senior management experience with an excellent track record. In addition to ZEEKR, Mr. An has successfully established, developed, and operated both Geely and Lynk&Co, two well-established vehicle brands of Geely Group. Lotus Technology is guided by its customer-oriented principle to provide customers with service and experience in every aspect of their journey with the company. Lotus Technology adopts a customer-oriented direct-to-consumer (DTC) sales model with a focus on innovative and interactive engagement with its customers. Lotus Technology has established extensive customer touchpoints including 24 ZEEKR Centers, 240 ZEEKR Spaces, 31 ZEEKR Delivery Centers, and 45 ZEEKR Houses in China, and two ZEEKR Centers overseas as of December 31, 2023. In addition, Lotus Technology closely interacts with customers by building an integrated online and offline customer community to provide a holistic experience that goes beyond the purchase of intelligent battery electric vehicles (BEVs). Within the ZEEKR APP, customers can enjoy one-stop car purchase, charging solutions, financial services, roadside assistance, intelligent car control, online shopping of ZEEKR lifestyle products, social interaction, and seamless communication with the customer services team. Lotus Technology also holds a variety of offline customer events to nurture a vibrant ZEEKR user community. The company's customer engagement efforts enable Lotus Technology to better understand customer needs to be incorporated into future product design and continuously strengthen customer loyalty and stickiness.

The vehicles are purpose-built TaaS vehicles based on SEA-M, which is an advanced version of SEA and a high-tech mobility solution that supports a range of future mobility products including robotaxis and logistics vehicles.

Lotus Technology's efforts are backed by its strong in-house research and development capabilities, high operational flexibility, and flat, efficient organizational structure. Together, these features enable fast product development, launch, and iteration, and a series of customer-oriented products and go-to-market strategies. Thus, Lotus Technology is able to rapidly expand even with a limited operating history.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: Lotus Technology began as a business unit within Geely Auto in October 2017. Lotus Technology conducts its business primarily through the following entities: (i) ZEEKR Automobile (Shanghai) Co., Ltd. (“ZEEKR Shanghai”), (ii) ZEEKR Automobile (Ningbo Hangzhou Bay New Zone) Co., Ltd. (“ZEEKR Hangzhou Bay”), (iii) Viridi E-Mobility Technology (Ningbo) Co., Ltd. (“Ningbo Viridi”) and (iv) Zeekr Technology Europe AB (“CEVT”). Under the leadership of the co-founders, Mr. Shufu Li, Mr. Conghui An, Mr. Donghui Li, and Mr. Shengyue Gui, ZEEKR Intelligent Technology was incorporated as an exempted company with limited liability in March 2021 under the law of the Cayman Islands to act as the holding company. ZEEKR Intelligent Technology is seeking to list separately from Geely Auto because of its different brand positioning and its operational, management, and financial independence. ZEEKR Intelligent Technology has an equity story built around its premium brand, product portfolio, and future plans that is better served by operating independently and seeking a separate listing, which the company believes will allow it to establish its own profile and attract different investors. In April 2021, ZEEKR Innovation, currently a wholly-owned subsidiary of ZEEKR Intelligent Technology, was incorporated under the laws of the British Virgin Islands. In the same period, ZEEKR Technology, currently a wholly-owned subsidiary of ZEEKR Innovation, was incorporated under the laws of Hong Kong. In April 2021, ZEEKR Intelligent Technology announced the launch of its first BEV model, ZEEKR 001, and started delivery from October 2021.

metadata.title_summary:
title: Our Corporate History 
summary: ZEEKR originated as a business unit within Geely Auto in October 2017 and has since evolved into a distinct entity with a focus on premium electric vehicles. Established as ZEEKR Intelligent Technology in March 2021 in the Cayman Islands, the company was co-founded by Mr. Shufu Li and others to pursue operational and financial independence from Geely Auto, allowing it to cultivate its own brand identity and attract diverse investors. The organization operates through several subsidiaries, including ZEEKR Automobile and ZEEKR Technology, and has made significant acquisitions to enhance its capabilities, such as acquiring ZEEKR Hangzhou Bay and CEVT from Geely Holding.

ZEEKR launched its first battery electric vehicle, the ZEEKR 001, in April 2021, followed by the ZEEKR 009 in November 2022 and the ZEEKR X compact SUV in April 2023. The company continues to expand its product lineup, introducing models like the ZEEKR 001 FR in October 2023 and an upscale sedan in January 2024. In April 2024, ZEEKR unveiled the ZEEKR 009 Grand, a luxury variant, and the ZEEKR MIX, a multi-purpose vehicle. This strategic focus on premium offerings and innovative designs positions ZEEKR as a competitive player in the electric vehicle market.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: In July 2021, ZEEKR Automobile (Ningbo Hangzhou Bay New Zone) Co., Ltd. acquired 100% equity interest in ZEEKR Automobile (Shanghai) Co., Ltd. from Geely Holding. In July 2021, ZEEKR Automobile (Ningbo Hangzhou Bay New Zone) Co., Ltd. was incorporated in the PRC and is currently a wholly-owned subsidiary of ZEEKR Technology. In August 2021, ZEEKR Automobile (Ningbo Hangzhou Bay New Zone) Co., Ltd. acquired 100% equity interest in ZEEKR Automobile (Shanghai) Co., Ltd. from Geely Auto and 1% from Geely Holding. In October 2021, ZEEKR Automobile (Ningbo Hangzhou Bay New Zone) Co., Ltd. acquired 51% equity interest in Ningbo Viridi, which was previously wholly owned by Geely Holding. In February 2022, ZEEKR Automobile (Ningbo Hangzhou Bay New Zone) Co., Ltd. acquired 100% equity interest in CEVT from Geely Holding. ZEEKR Automobile (Ningbo Hangzhou Bay New Zone) Co., Ltd. currently holds 100% equity interest in CEVT through Zhejiang ZEEKR. In November 2022, ZEEKR Automobile (Ningbo Hangzhou Bay New Zone) Co., Ltd. launched its second BEV model, ZEEKR 009, and started delivery in January 2023. In April 2023, ZEEKR Automobile (Ningbo Hangzhou Bay New Zone) Co., Ltd. released the ZEEKR X, its compact SUV model, and began to deliver the ZEEKR X in June 2023. In October 2023, ZEEKR Automobile (Ningbo Hangzhou Bay New Zone) Co., Ltd. released the ZEEKR 001 FR, and ZEEKR Automobile (Ningbo Hangzhou Bay New Zone) Co., Ltd. started to deliver the ZEEKR 001 FR in November 2023.

metadata.title_summary:
title: Our Corporate History 
summary: ZEEKR originated as a business unit within Geely Auto in October 2017 and has since evolved into a distinct entity with a focus on premium electric vehicles. Established as ZEEKR Intelligent Technology in March 2021 in the Cayman Islands, the company was co-founded by Mr. Shufu Li and others to pursue operational and financial independence from Geely Auto, allowing it to cultivate its own brand identity and attract diverse investors. The organization operates through several subsidiaries, including ZEEKR Automobile and ZEEKR Technology, and has made significant acquisitions to enhance its capabilities, such as acquiring ZEEKR Hangzhou Bay and CEVT from Geely Holding.

ZEEKR launched its first battery electric vehicle, the ZEEKR 001, in April 2021, followed by the ZEEKR 009 in November 2022 and the ZEEKR X compact SUV in April 2023. The company continues to expand its product lineup, introducing models like the ZEEKR 001 FR in October 2023 and an upscale sedan in January 2024. In April 2024, ZEEKR unveiled the ZEEKR 009 Grand, a luxury variant, and the ZEEKR MIX, a multi-purpose vehicle. This strategic focus on premium offerings and innovative designs positions ZEEKR as a competitive player in the electric vehicle market.

title: 1. Principal activities and history of the group 
summary: ZEEKR Intelligent Technology Holding Limited, established in the Cayman Islands on March 31, 2021, is dedicated to the commercialization and sales of electric vehicles (EVs) and batteries, alongside providing automotive-related research and development services. The company emerged from a restructuring of operations previously managed by Zhejiang Geely Holding Group Co., Ltd., with the aim of creating a focused battery electric vehicle (BEV) business to attract investment and facilitate overseas listings.

The ZEEKR Group comprises several entities, each with specific roles in the EV ecosystem. Key entities include ZEEKR Automobile (Shanghai) Co., Ltd., an investment holding company; ZEEKR Automobile (Ningbo Hangzhou Bay New Zone) Co., Ltd., which handles EV production and commercialization; Viridi E-Mobility Technology (Ningbo) Co., Ltd., focused on electric powertrains and battery packs; and Zeekr Technology Europe AB in Sweden, specializing in research and development.

The restructuring process involved transferring relevant businesses to ZEEKR, which was recognized as a holding company for BEV operations previously under Geely Holding. These transactions, treated as restructuring under common control, aimed to streamline operations and enhance ZEEKR's strategic focus on advancing electric vehicle commercialization and supporting related activities.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: In 2021, in an effort to establish an independent Battery Electric Vehicles (BEV) business to obtain investment from outside investors and in preparation for an overseas listing, Zhejiang Geely Holding Group Co., Ltd. (“Geely Holding”), the controlling shareholder of Geely Automobile Holdings Limited (‘‘Geely Auto’’), undertook a series of contemplated reorganizations (the “Reorganization”). The main purpose of the Reorganization is to establish ZEEKR Intelligent Technology Holding Limited as the overseas holding company for the above BEV-related businesses that were originally operated within Geely Holding and Geely Auto. Subsequent to the establishment of ZEEKR in March 2021, the above businesses were transferred to ZEEKR by Geely Holding and Geely Auto as part of the Reorganization. As these entities being transferred are all under the common control of Geely Holding, these transfers were accounted for as a restructuring of entities under common control as follows: • In July 2021, ZEEKR Intelligent Technology Holding Limited established Zhejiang ZEEKR Intelligent Technology Co., Ltd. (“Zhejiang ZEEKR”) in the People’s Republic of China (“PRC”), a wholly-owned subsidiary. • In July 2021, ZEEKR Automobile (Shanghai) Co., Ltd. (“ZEEKR Shanghai”), a subsidiary of Geely Automobile Holdings Limited (“Geely Auto”), acquired 100% equity interest in ZEEKR Automobile (Ningbo Hangzhou Bay New Zone) Co., Ltd. (“ZEEKR Hangzhou Bay”) from Zhejiang Geely Holding Group Co., Ltd. (“Geely Holding”) for a cash consideration of RMB485.3 million. The net book value of ZEEKR Hangzhou Bay at the time of acquisition was RMB500 million.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: Lotus Technology is a fast-growing BEV technology company. Through developing and offering next-generation premium BEVs and technology-driven solutions, Lotus Technology aspires to lead the electrification, intelligentization, and innovation of the automobile industry. Since its inception, Lotus Technology has focused on innovation in BEV architecture, hardware, software, and the application of new technologies. Lotus Technology's efforts are backed by strong in-house R&D capabilities, a deep understanding of products, high operational flexibility, and a flat, efficient organizational structure. Together, these features enable fast product development, launch, and iteration, as well as a series of customer-oriented products and go-to-market strategies. Thus, Lotus Technology is able to rapidly expand even with a limited operating history. Lotus Technology strategically spearheaded the premium intelligent BEV market with unique positioning, featuring a strong sense of technology, in-house R&D capabilities, stylish design, high-caliber performance, and a premium user experience. Lotus Technology's current product portfolio primarily includes ZEEKR 001, ZEEKR 001 FR, ZEEKR 009, ZEEKR X, and an upscale sedan model. ZEEKR 001. With an unwavering commitment to its mission, Lotus Technology released ZEEKR 001 in April 2021, a five-seater, cross-over hatchback vehicle model with superior performance and functionality. Targeting the premium BEV market, ZEEKR 001 is Lotus Technology's first vehicle model and the world’s first mass-produced pure electric shooting brake, according to Frost & Sullivan. ZEEKR 001 is also the first mass-produced BEV model with over $1,000 km CLTC range, according to Frost & Sullivan. Lotus Technology began the delivery of ZEEKR 001 in October 2021.

metadata.title_summary:
title: OVERVIEW 
summary: ZEEKR is an emerging leader in the battery electric vehicle (BEV) sector, focusing on premium models and innovative technology solutions. With a strong emphasis on in-house research and development, the company has established a flexible organizational structure that enables rapid product development and market entry. Since its inception, ZEEKR has launched several notable models, including the ZEEKR 001, recognized as the world's first mass-produced pure electric shooting brake, and the ZEEKR 009, a luxury MPV. The company has achieved impressive sales milestones, delivering over 196,000 vehicles by the end of 2023, with significant growth in both the Chinese and European markets.

ZEEKR leverages the SEA platform from Geely Group, which provides a modular architecture for various vehicle types and supports advanced technologies. The company is committed to enhancing its vehicles with cutting-edge features, including autonomous driving capabilities and an intelligent cockpit experience. ZEEKR's robust supply chain and manufacturing capabilities, coupled with strategic partnerships with industry leaders like Mobileye and CATL, further bolster its competitive edge.

The BEV market is poised for substantial growth, particularly in China and Europe, driven by technological advancements and favorable regulations. ZEEKR aims to capitalize on this trend by expanding its product lineup and enhancing customer engagement through a direct-to-consumer sales model and a comprehensive charging network. The company's vision is to redefine premium mobility with innovative, high-performance electric vehicles that cater to the evolving needs of consumers.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: ZEEKR Intelligent Technology Holding Limited (the “Company” or “Zeekr”) was incorporated under the laws of the Cayman Islands on March 31, 2021. The Company, together with its subsidiaries (collectively, the “Group”), is principally engaged in the commercialization and sales of electric vehicles and batteries, as well as the provision of automotive-related research and development services. Prior to the establishment of ZEEKR Intelligent Technology Holding Limited, the Group’s businesses were conducted through the following entities: (i) ZEEKR Automobile (Shanghai) Co., Ltd., previously known as Shanghai Maple Guorun Automobile Company Ltd. (“Zeekr Shanghai”); (ii) ZEEKR Automobile (Ningbo Hangzhou Bay New Zone) Co., Ltd. (“Zeekr Hangzhou Bay”); (iii) Viridi E-Mobility Technology (Ningbo) Co., Ltd. (“Ningbo Viridi”); (iv) ZEEKR Technology Europe AB (“ZTE”, previously known as China-Euro Vehicle Technology Aktiebolag or “CEVT”). In 2021, in an effort to establish an independent Battery Electric Vehicles (BEV) business to obtain investment from outside investors and in preparation for an overseas listing, Zhejiang Geely Holding Group Co., Ltd. (“Geely Holding”), the controlling shareholder of Geely Automobile Holdings Limited (“Geely Auto”), undertook a series of contemplated reorganizations (the “Reorganization”). The main purpose of the Reorganization was to establish ZEEKR Intelligent Technology Holding Limited as the overseas holding company for the above BEV-related businesses that were originally operated within Geely Holding and Geely Auto. Subsequent to the establishment of ZEEKR Intelligent Technology Holding Limited in March 2021, the above businesses were transferred to ZEEKR Intelligent Technology Holding Limited by Geely Holding and Geely Auto as part of the Reorganization.

metadata.title_summary:
title: 1. Principal activities and history of the Group 
summary: ZEEKR Intelligent Technology Holding Limited, established on March 31, 2021, in the Cayman Islands, specializes in the commercialization and sales of electric vehicles and batteries, along with providing automotive-related research and development services through its subsidiaries. The company emerged from a reorganization initiated by Zhejiang Geely Holding Group Co., Ltd., which aimed to create an independent Battery Electric Vehicles (BEV) business to attract external investment and prepare for an overseas listing. This reorganization involved transferring various entities, including ZEEKR Automobile (Shanghai) Co., Ltd., ZEEKR Automobile (Ningbo Hangzhou Bay New Zone) Co., Ltd., Viridi E-Mobility Technology (Ningbo) Co., Ltd., and ZEEKR Technology Europe AB, under the common control of Geely Holding to Zeekr.

In July 2021, ZEEKR established a wholly-owned subsidiary in China and subsequently acquired full equity stakes in Zeekr Hangzhou Bay and Zeekr Shanghai, incurring minor losses in additional paid-in capital. Additionally, Zeekr Shanghai acquired a 51% interest in Ningbo Viridi and later, in February 2022, ZTE from Geely Holding, further solidifying its operational structure. By May 2024, ZEEKR achieved a significant milestone by successfully listing on the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE), marking its growth and establishment in the electric vehicle market.

metadata.title_summary:
title: Smart Cockpit 
summary: Zeekr's smart cockpit, set to launch in 2024, is powered by Zeekr OS, a specialized distributed operating system designed for battery electric vehicles (BEVs). This system integrates advanced electronic and electrical architecture, enabling real-time processing power allocation to enhance user interactions, autonomous driving, and vehicle control. Key features include a unified service-oriented architecture, in-house R&D, improved network diagnostics, and automated software integration testing, which together minimize system lag and support continuous updates. The multi-kernel compatibility allows for advanced functionalities like 360-degree surround-view monitoring and intelligent energy management, setting a new benchmark for BEV software.

The smart cockpit experience is further elevated by the Qualcomm 8295 SoC platform, particularly in the Zeekr 009 Grand, which boasts a dual-8295 configuration. The Zeekr Sound audio system delivers premium sound through AI-driven tuning, while the HMI 3.5 offers advanced 3D navigation and visual effects, enhanced by the intuitive Eva family interface. EVA, the AI assistant, leverages machine learning and natural language processing for intelligent voice interactions and customizable AI personas. The open cockpit ecosystem promotes a virtualized mobile platform and IoT connectivity, allowing integration with smart home devices and entertainment options like Kid Zone, Tencent Cloud Gaming, and wireless karaoke. Overall, Zeekr's smart cockpit, driven by Zeekr OS and AI advancements, aims to provide an immersive and connected driving experience.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: 5. Lotus Technology notes that the company purchases vehicles for resale from Geely Holding at a price made up of the purchase cost of direct materials and a pre-agreed markup. Please describe the manufacturer’s warranty provided by Geely Holding for these vehicles and to what extent the manufacturer’s warranties have an impact on Lotus Technology's accounting for warranty expenses, if material. In response to the Staff’s comment, Lotus Technology has revised the disclosure on page 90 of the Revised Draft Registration Statement. Lotus Technology respectfully advises the Staff that under the cooperation framework agreement between Lotus Technology and Geely Holding, ZEEKR Factory provides an assurance-type product warranty for all product quality problems caused by its manufacturing, with a warranty period no less than what Lotus Technology offers to its customers. In the event where the product defect is caused by raw material suppliers, Lotus Technology is entitled to seek damages from ZEEKR Factory, which in turn could seek damages from the responsible suppliers. Lotus Technology further advises the Staff that when estimating warranties, the accrual is established based on estimates of the nature, frequency, and average costs of future claims, net of estimated warranty cost recoveries, to the extent that is estimable and probable.

metadata.title_summary:
title: Cooperation Framework Agreement, page 89 
summary: The summary describes the vehicle purchasing process from Geely Holding, which involves acquiring vehicles at a cost that includes direct material expenses plus a predetermined markup. It also highlights the manufacturer's warranty provided by Geely Holding, specifically an assurance-type product warranty for manufacturing-related quality issues, which aligns with the Company's customer offerings. The Company has updated its disclosure in the Revised Draft Registration Statement to reflect these details. Additionally, it addresses the accounting implications of warranty expenses, noting that warranty accruals are calculated based on estimates of future claims, taking into account the nature, frequency, and average costs, as well as any potential recoveries from raw material suppliers for defects.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: The on-the-road charging solutions comprise charging stations operated by ZEEKR Power. The ZEEKR APP also helps drivers locate and navigate to nearby third-party charging stations. As of December 31, 2023, there were 882 charging stations operated by ZEEKR Power, including 436 ultra charging stations, 330 super charging stations, and 116 light charging stations, covering over 130 cities in China. As of the same date, there were over 54 thousand third-party charging stations with approximately 610 thousand charging piles available on the ZEEKR APP, covering over 340 cities in China. In particular, the on-the-road charging solutions comprise charging stations operated by ZEEKR Power. • Ultra charging station. The ultra charging stations provide up-to-600 kW chargers to customers. ZEEKR Power is one of the earliest to use proprietary liquid-cooling technology in China, according to Frost & Sullivan, which allows the charging process to be shortened by approximately 60% to 75% as compared to conventional 150kW–240kW chargers. The liquid-cooling technology uses 24 mm diameter charging cables, making it significantly lighter than conventional cables and allowing drivers to plug in the cable with one hand. • Super charging station and light charging station. Customers who need a prompt quick recharge can use the super charging stations that are installed with up-to-240 kW chargers and the light charging stations that are equipped with up-to-20 kW light chargers, respectively.

title: On-The-Road Charging Solutions 
summary: As of December 31, 2023, ZEEKR Power has established a network of 882 charging stations across over 130 cities in China, comprising 436 ultra charging stations, 330 super charging stations, and 116 light charging stations. The ZEEKR APP enhances the charging experience by helping drivers locate more than 54,000 third-party charging stations, which collectively offer around 610,000 charging piles in over 340 cities. The on-the-road charging solutions are designed to facilitate electric vehicle charging during transit, aiming to improve convenience and reduce downtime for drivers. Notably, the ultra charging stations provide high-capacity chargers of up to 600 kW, utilizing innovative liquid-cooling technology that significantly decreases charging time by 60% to 75% compared to traditional chargers. This technology features lightweight 24 mm diameter cables for easier handling. Meanwhile, the super charging stations offer rapid recharging with up to 240 kW, and light charging stations cater to gradual charging needs with capacities of up to 20 kW, ensuring a range of efficient options for electric vehicle users.

metadata.title_summary:
title: ZEEKR 009 
summary: The ZEEKR 009, launched on November 1, 2022, is a luxury six-seater MPV designed for families and business groups, focusing on safety, comfort, and performance. Following its launch, it quickly gained popularity, leading to reservations and deliveries starting in January 2023. 

Safety features include a one-piece high-strength aluminum body that effectively absorbs impacts, making it the first MPV globally to pass the frontal center column collision test. It also incorporates advanced driving assistance technologies akin to those in the ZEEKR 001. 

In terms of comfort, the ZEEKR 009 boasts a spacious cabin of approximately 7.4 square meters with six luxurious leather chairs, a 15.6-inch ceiling-mounted screen, and an intelligent in-cabin interaction system. The vehicle is equipped with an air suspension system that adjusts ground clearance for optimal comfort, and the first two rows of seats feature massage functionality.

Performance-wise, the ZEEKR 009 is powered by CATL’s Qilin battery, offering an impressive range of over 800 km (CLTC) and a dual electric motor system that delivers a maximum power of 400 kW and torque of 686 N·m, achieving 0 to 100 km/h in just 4.5 seconds. 

Connectivity features include a 10.25-inch instrument cluster, an AI Mate smart assistant, and a premium YAMAHA audio system. The vehicle’s intelligence is enhanced by a Mobileye EyeQ5H chip and the Falcon Eye Vidar system for improved vision and an advanced autonomous driving experience.

Since its introduction, the ZEEKR 009 has generated substantial revenue, accounting for 17.2% of the company's total revenue in its first year. In April 2024, ZEEKR expanded its lineup with the ZEEKR 009 Grand, a luxury variant that emphasizes enhanced safety, privacy, and intelligence, featuring a robust electrical system and advanced processing capabilities for a superior driving experience. Overall, the ZEEKR 009 exemplifies the brand's commitment to innovation in electric mobility and intelligent driving technologies, appealing to a premium market with its luxurious offerings.

metadata.title_summary:
title: ZEEKR 001 
summary: The ZEEKR 001, launched on April 15, 2021, is ZEEKR's inaugural mass-produced battery electric vehicle (BEV), designed as a premium crossover shooting brake. Built on the SEA platform and developed through proprietary research and market insights, the ZEEKR 001 has received positive feedback for its performance, stylish design, and versatility since deliveries began on October 23, 2021. A notable achievement occurred in October 2022 when ZEEKR delivered 10,119 units in a single month, marking it as the first pure-electric premium vehicle from a Chinese brand to surpass this milestone, as recognized by Frost & Sullivan.

In February 2024, ZEEKR introduced the upgraded 2024 model of the ZEEKR 001, featuring significant enhancements such as an 800V high-voltage system, a Qualcomm Snapdragon 8295 chip, and ZEEKR OS 6.0. This model boasts impressive performance metrics, including a 0 to 100 km/h acceleration time of just 3.3 seconds, advanced safety features through the Mobileye EVO platform, and luxurious interior amenities like a dual-chamber air suspension and a state-of-the-art cockpit with multiple high-definition displays.

The 2024 ZEEKR 001 is powered by a robust 100 kWh battery, offering a CLTC range of 705 km and ultra-fast charging capabilities. It delivers a maximum power output of 580 kW and peak torque of 810 N·m, ensuring exceptional driving performance. The vehicle also incorporates advanced connectivity features, including frameless automatic doors and an augmented reality heads-up display, while its intelligence is enhanced by a high-performance Mobileye EyeQ5H chip for autonomous driving capabilities.

The ZEEKR 001 has generated significant revenue since its launch, with total sales reaching RMB 1,544.3 million in 2021, RMB 19,671.2 million in 2022, and RMB 20,635.4 million in 2023. In October 2023, ZEEKR expanded its lineup with the ZEEKR 001 FR, a crossover hatchback model that features advanced design and technology, including a maximum power output of 930 kW and acceleration from 0 to 100 km/h in just 2.02 seconds. The ZEEKR 001 FR is built on the SEA platform and incorporates lightweight carbon fiber components for improved performance and aerodynamics.

Overall, the ZEEKR 001 and its 2024 model, along with the new ZEEKR 001 FR, exemplify ZEEKR's commitment to delivering a luxurious and technologically advanced electric vehicle experience, emphasizing performance, comfort, and innovative features.

metadata.title_summary:
title: ZEEKR X 
summary: In April 2023, ZEEKR introduced the ZEEKR X, a compact SUV that emphasizes innovative interior design, cutting-edge technology, and exceptional driving performance. Deliveries began in June 2023, generating approximately RMB 4,174.2 million (around US$587.9 million) in revenue by the end of the year, which represented 8.1% of the company's total revenue. The ZEEKR X is characterized by its optimized size, measuring 4,450 mm in length, 1,836 mm in width, and 1,572 mm in height, with a wheelbase of 2,750 mm, providing a spacious yet compact driving experience.

Equipped with a 66 kWh battery, the ZEEKR X offers a maximum range of 512 km and features a dual electric motor all-wheel drive system that delivers a powerful output of 315 kW, allowing it to accelerate from 0 to 100 km/h in just 3.7 seconds. The vehicle also includes advanced safety and connectivity features, such as a Frameless Door with an Inductive Hidden Door Handle, an AR HUD Head-Up Display, and a premium YAMAHA audio system. 

The ZEEKR X stands out with its four-seat configuration, offering two spacious back seats for enhanced comfort, and an innovative interactive B-pillar that integrates a 3D camera and touchscreen for convenient vehicle access and status checks. With its focus on sustainability, user experience, and modern engineering, the ZEEKR X positions itself as a competitive option in the electric vehicle market, showcasing a blend of luxury and performance that caters to the needs of contemporary drivers.
